title: carex jiuhuaensis
intro: Carex jiuhuaensis, also known as Jiuhua sedge, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the family Cyperaceae, commonly found in China. Research has shown that Carex jiuhuaensis possesses medicinal properties, particularly in its rhizome, which has anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects, making it a potential treatment for fever and rheumatism. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and improving cardiovascular function. Carex jiuhuaensis can be prepared as an herbal decoction or infusion, typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
